name: Vaswani Industries Limited
summary: Vaswani Industries Limited manufactures and trades in iron ore pellets, sponge iron, steel billets, HB wires, and ingots in India. The company operates through Iron & Steel, and Power segments. It also generates power through waste heat recovery boilers with an installed capacity of 11.5 megawatts. Vaswani Industries Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Raipur, India.
